description.en: AI-powered Kanban board for coding agents. Create issues, assign them to Claude Code, Codex, or Gemini CLI, and watch them work in real time — with diff viewer, web terminal, and multi-turn chat.
description.zh: AI 驱动的看板应用，专为编程代理设计。创建任务、分配给 Claude Code、Codex 或 Gemini CLI，实时查看工作进度——内置 diff 查看器、Web 终端和多轮对话。
